# prune module constants
CORRECTION_PENALTY = 0.15
DEFAULT_DECAY_DAYS = 90
DEFAULT_DECAY_THRESHOLD = 0.2
DEFAULT_DRIFT_THRESHOLD = 0.5
DEFAULT_INTERACTIVE_MERGE_THRESHOLD = 0.4
DEFAULT_MERGE_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD = 0.6
USAGE_RECORDING_FIX_DATE = '2026-06-12'
ZERO_INVOCATION_DAYS = 30

# prune public function / class signatures
SkillDependencyError(message: str, referrers: List[Dict[str, Any]] | None = None)
archive_file(filepath: str, reason: str, *, force: bool = False, repo_root: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> str | None
check_import_dependencies(skill_path: pathlib.Path, repo_root: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
cleanup_corrections(dry_run: bool = False) -> Dict[str, int]
compute_decay_score(age_days: float, correction_count: int = 0, decay_days: float = 90) -> float
detect_dead_globs(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_decay_candidates(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]], decay_days: float = 90) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_duplicates(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_reference_drift(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]], project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_retirement_candidates(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]], contribution_scores: Dict[str, Any] | None = None, contribution_threshold: float = 0.3, min_invocations: int = 5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_zero_invocations(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]], days: int = 30, project_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
determine_primary(skill_a: str, skill_b: str) -> tuple
extract_skill_summary(skill_path: pathlib.Path) -> str
is_pinned(skill_path: pathlib.Path) -> bool
is_reference_skill(skill_path: pathlib.Path) -> bool
list_archive() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
load_corrections() -> Dict[str, List[Dict]]
load_decay_threshold() -> float
load_drift_threshold() -> float
load_interactive_merge_threshold() -> float
load_merge_similarity_threshold() -> float
main() -> None
make_global_candidates_summary(count: int) -> Dict[str, Any]
make_zero_invocation_suppression_summary(suppressed_count: int) -> Dict[str, Any]
merge_duplicates(duplicate_candidates: List[Dict[str, Any]], reorganize_merge_groups: List[Dict[str, Any]] | None = None, project_dir: str | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
restore_file(archive_path: str) -> str | None
run_prune(project_dir: str | None = None, reorganize_merge_groups: list | None = None, now: datetime.datetime | None = None, pj_scoped: bool = True, dry_run: bool = False) -> Dict[str, Any]
safe_global_check(artifacts: Dict[str, List[pathlib.Path]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
suggest_recommendation(skill_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> str
zero_invocation_reeval_date(days: int = 30) -> str
zero_invocation_window_suppressed(days: int = 30, now: datetime.datetime | None = None) -> bool
